headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 12, 2026**
article:
The day's top news saw several teams secure victories, while others fell short. The Washington Nationals dropped a 5-2 decision to the Miami Marlins, with Heriberto Hernández leading the Nationals' offense. In a thrilling matchup, the Baltimore Orioles took down the Athletics 2-1, with Gunnar Henderson leading the offense. The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 4-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Nick Martinez earning the win.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, including Addison Barger, who has been placed on the 10-day injured list by the Toronto Blue Jays due to right elbow inflammation. The Atlanta Braves have placed Eli White on the 7-day injured list with a concussion. The Detroit Tigers have transferred Justin Verlander to the 60-day injured list with left hip inflammation and placed Kerry Carpenter on the 10-day injured list with a left AC Joint Sprain.

The day's roster movement saw several trades and transactions. The San Francisco Giants traded Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for LHP Matt Wilkinson and other considerations. The Baltimore Orioles acquired RHP Enyel Garcia and RHP Maicol Lauriano from the Philadelphia Phillies in exchange for cash. The Chicago Cubs acquired RHP Tyler Ferguson from the Athletics, while the Tampa Bay Rays traded RHP Yoendrys Gómez to the Minnesota Twins for cash.

top_news.title: **Nationals Fall to Marlins in 5-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dropped a 5-2 decision to the Miami Marlins, with Heriberto Hernández leading the Nationals' offense with 2 hits and 2 RBIs. Andrew Nardi made a strong relief appearance, striking out 2 batters in 0.2 innings.

top_news.title: **Orioles Take Down Athletics in Thrilling Match**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles secured a 2-1 victory over the Athletics, with Gunnar Henderson leading the offense with 2 hits and 1 RBI. Chris Bassitt earned the win for the Orioles, pitching 6 strong innings with 6 strikeouts and 1 earned run.

top_news.title: **Rays Take Down Red Sox 4-1**
top_news.summary: The Tampa Bay Rays secured a 4-1 victory over the Boston Red Sox, with Nick Martinez earning the win. Junior Caminero led the Rays' offense with a home run and an RBI.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Phillies in Dominant 6-0 Shutout**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a tough loss, falling 6-0 to the Philadelphia Phillies. Cristopher Sánchez led the Phillies to victory, pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts and 0 earned runs.

top_news.title: **Angels Fall to Guardians in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured a 7-2 victory over the Los Angeles Angels, snapping their opponent's winning streak. Impact players for the Guardians included Kyle Manzardo and Patrick Bailey, while Jo Adell and Nolan Schanuel stood out for the Angels.

top_news.title: **Yankees Fall Short in Baltimore**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees dropped a 2-3 decision to the Baltimore Orioles, marking their latest loss. Impact players for the Orioles included Ben Rice and Coby Mayo, while Ryan Weathers had a standout performance on the mound.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays' Addison Barger Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Toronto Blue Jays right fielder Addison Barger has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to right elbow inflammation, effective retroactive to May 10, 2026.

top_news.title: **Giants Make Key Trade Addition**
top_news.summary: The San Francisco Giants acquired LHP Matt Wilkinson from the Cleveland Guardians in exchange for C Patrick Bailey on May 9, 2026. Wilkinson joins the Giants' pitching staff in a trade that brings new depth to the team.
